title: Menthol Protocol to Bleach Aiptasia
author: Virginia Weis
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.immcc46

steps.title: Slowly add 1
steps.instruction: Slowly add 1.35 mL of menthol (20 g/L) to the ASW 1 drop at a time. Stir constantly with the bubbler to prevent a surface film. Final concentration = 0.58 mM menthol solution

steps.title: Leave bubblers inside the container, replace...
steps.instruction: Leave bubblers inside the container, replace the lid, and wait for 8 hours. 08:00:00, Menthol incubation

steps.title: Drain the menthol/ASW and replace with fresh ASW
steps.instruction: Drain the menthol/ASW and replace with fresh ASW.

steps.title: Leave the containers overnight in the dark
steps.instruction: Leave the containers overnight in the dark.

steps.title: Repeat for three days
steps.instruction: Repeat for three days. go to step #1

steps.title: After day 3 of menthol treatment,...
steps.instruction: After day 3 of menthol treatment, store Aiptasia in the dark. Note: an extra day of exposure may be necessary. See Description for more information.
